subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Our presence, and the gaze of thy Lord, the All-Knowing, the All-Informed, hath been directed towards it, and We have answered thee when the Ancient King came forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک و توجه الیه لحاظ ربک العلیم الخبیر و اجبناک اذ خرج مالک القدم
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @predictions and prophecies
